expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

partitionExpressions:

 Refresh = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.FromList(List.DateTimes(DateTime.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), 1, #duration(0, 0, 0, 0)), Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Last Data Refresh (UTC)"}, null, ExtraValues.Error), {{"Last Data Refresh (UTC)", type datetime}}),
#"Added Environment" = Table.AddColumn(Refresh, "Environment", each _Environment),

RETURN

tables.name: @Measures
partitionExpressions:

in

measures.name: AFS Sales Compare Label
measures.expression:
VAR _current =
    [AFS Sales Selected Period]
 
VAR _ly =
    [AFS Sales Selected Period LY]
 
VAR _pct =
    ROUND(DIVIDE(_current, _ly) - 1, 3)
 
VAR _arrow =
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        ISBLANK(_pct),  UNICHAR(9644),
        _pct > 0,       UNICHAR(9650),
        _pct < 0,       UNICHAR(9660),
        UNICHAR(9644)
    )
 
VAR _sign =
    IF(_pct > 0, "+", "")
 
RETURN
    IF(
        ISBLANK(_pct),
        "— 0.0%",
        _arrow & " " & _sign & FORMAT(_pct, "#,##0.0%")
    )

VAR selected_metric_sk =
    SELECTEDVALUE( 'Metric Selector'[metric_sk], "SALES" )
RETURN

    legend = "Today",          [Metric Value],

)

measures.name: Cutoff Hour Title
measures.expression:
VAR cutoff_Hour =
    MAXX(
        FILTER(
            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]),
            NOT ISBLANK(
                CALCULATE(
                    [Metric Value],
                    'Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description] = "Today",
                    KEEPFILTERS('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour])
                )
            )
        ),
        'Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]
    )
RETURN
CONCATENATE(cutoff_Hour, ":00")

measures.name: Cutoff Hour
measures.expression:
VAR cutoff_Hour =

            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]),
            NOT ISBLANK(

                    'Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description] = "Today",
                    KEEPFILTERS('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour])
                )
            )
        ),
        'Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]
    )
RETURN
cutoff_Hour

measures.name: Sales Comparison Period
measures.expression:
VAR selected_period =
    SELECTEDVALUE(
        'Period Selector Top 10 Product'[period_sk],
        "Today"
    )
VAR _CutoffHour = [Cutoff Hour]
VAR _SalesToday = [Sales Today]
VAR _SalesYesterday =
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales Yesterday],
        FILTER(
            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]),
            'Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour] <= _CutoffHour
        )
    )
VAR _SalesLW =
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales LW],
        FILTER(
            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour]),
            'Demand Sale Current Day'[Order Hour] <= _CutoffHour
        )
    )
VAR _CompValue =
    SWITCH(
        selected_period,
        "Today", _SalesYesterday,
        "Yesterday", _SalesLW
    )
VAR _CurrentValue =
    SWITCH(
        selected_period,
        "Today", _SalesToday,
        "Yesterday", _SalesYesterday
    )
VAR _Pct = DIVIDE( _CurrentValue - _CompValue, _CompValue )
VAR _CompValueK = DIVIDE( _CompValue, 1000 )
VAR _PctFormatted = FORMAT( ABS( _Pct ), "0.0%" )
VAR _PctSign = IF( _Pct >= 0, "(+" & _PctFormatted & ")", "(-" & _PctFormatted & ")" )
RETURN
    IF(
        ISBLANK( _CompValue ),
        BLANK(),
        "£" & FORMAT( _CompValueK, "#,##0.0" ) & "K " & _PctSign
    )

VAR _LY = [Total Realized Markdown (TRM) % RSV LY]

measures.name: Total Realized Markdown (TRM) % RSV
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Realised Markdown Order Line],
    [Retail Sales Value (RSV)],
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Total Realized Markdown (TRM) % Selected Period
measures.expression:
VAR selected_period =
    SELECTEDVALUE(
        'Period Selector Top 10 Product'[period_sk],
        "Today"
    )

VAR trm =
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Realised Markdown],
        FILTER(
            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description]),
            'Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description] = selected_period
        )
    )

VAR sales_exc_tax =
    CALCULATE(
        SUM('Demand Sale Current Day'[Sales Value Exc Tax]),
        FILTER(
            ALL('Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description]),
            'Demand Sale Current Day'[Date Description] = selected_period
        )
    )

RETURN
    DIVIDE(trm, sales_exc_tax)

measures.name: Units YTD
measures.expression:
VAR _LastDate = TODAY() - 1
VAR _YearStart = DATE( YEAR( _LastDate ), 1, 1 )
RETURN
CALCULATE(
    [Units],
    REMOVEFILTERS( 'Date' ),
    'Date'[Calendar Date] >= _YearStart,
    'Date'[Calendar Date] <= _LastDate
)
